{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/37152314?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/swapgs", "id": 37152314, "login": "swapgs", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM3MTUyMzE0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/swapgs", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2024-40624", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "### Summary

In `torrentpier/library/includes/functions.php`, `get_tracks()` uses the unsafe native PHP serialization format to deserialize user-controlled cookies:

https://github.com/torrentpier/torrentpier/blob/84f6c9f4a081d9ffff4c233098758280304bf50f/library/includes/functions.php#L41-L60

### PoC

One can use [`phpggc`](https://github.com/ambionics/phpggc/) and the chain `Guzzle/FW1` to write PHP code to an arbitrary file, and execute commands on the system. For instance, the cookie `bb_t` will be deserialized when browsing to `viewforum.php`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00995, "percentile": 0.58513}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fg86-4c2r-7wxw", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-07-15T17:48:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fg86-4c2r-7wxw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fg86-4c2r-7wxw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-40624"}], "nvd_published_at": "2024-07-15T20:15:04Z", "published_at": "2024-07-15T17:48:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/torrentpier/torrentpier/security/advisories/GHSA-fg86-4c2r-7wxw", "https://github.com/torrentpier/torrentpier/commit/ed37e6e522f345f2b46147c6f53c1ab6dec1db9e", "https://github.com/torrentpier/torrentpier/blob/84f6c9f4a081d9ffff4c233098758280304bf50f/library/includes/functions.php#L41-L60", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-40624", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fg86-4c2r-7wxw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/torrentpier/torrentpier/security-advisories/GHSA-fg86-4c2r-7wxw", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/torrentpier/torrentpier", "summary": "TorrentPier Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:37:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fg86-4c2r-7wxw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.4.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "torrentpier/torrentpier"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.4.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: TorrentPier Deserialization of Untrusted Data vulnerability
